source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/05_설계개발 검증 및 유효성 확인/15_규격 Test/6.1. REP031071 [A1717MCW] (Wireless) EMC Test report_A1.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: EMC test report amendment for H&abyz A1717MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector updating EN 301 489 standard versions without testing.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory/RA evidence for EMC standards applied to the A1717MCW wireless Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector and documents the amendment from basic report NK-22-E-0815 to REP031071.
keyPoints: Product is identified as a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, model A1717MCW, trade mark H&abyz.
The report was tested according to EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3:2019, EN 301 489-3 V2.3.2:2023, and EN 301 489-17 V3.2.6:2023.
REP031071 is Amendment 1 and amends previous basic report NK-22-E-0815.
The amendment states the test standard version was updated without testing because there were no technical deviations for the product between specified old and updated standard versions.
No variants and no modifications are recorded for the EUT.

evidence.claim: The document is an EMC Test Report Amendment 1 for model A1717MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: A1717MCW EMC Test Report Reference No.:REP031071 EMC Test Report Amendment 1

evidence.claim: The product under test is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The model covered by the report is A1717MCW.
The report was issued on March 07, 2024.
The report was tested according to EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3:2019, EN 301 489-3 V2.3.2:2023, and EN 301 489-17 V3.2.6:2023.
REP031071 amends previous basic report NK-22-E-0815.
evidence.evidenceText: This test report amend previous report no. NK-22-E-0815 (Basic Report).

evidence.claim: The EUT rated voltage is DC 16 V, 3 A, with tested voltage DC 16 V.
evidence.evidenceText: Rated Voltage: DC 16 V, 3 A Tested Voltage & Power Frequency: DC 16 V

evidence.claim: No variants are covered by this report.
evidence.evidenceText: 2.2 Variants Covered By This Report (Model Distinction) Model Name Technical Deviations From Reference Model N/A N/A

evidence.claim: The amendment was issued due to test standards update in accordance with customer's request.
evidence.evidenceText: Due to test standards update in accordance with customer’s request, we issue the test report No. REP031071.

evidence.claim: The report states there are no technical deviations for the product between EN 301 489-3 V2.1.1:2019 and V2.3.2:2023, and between EN 301 489-17 V3.2.4:2020 and V3.2.6:2023.
evidence.evidenceText: The following standards, there are no technical deviations for this product : - between EN 301 489-3 V2.1.1:2019 and EN 301 489-3 V2.3.2:2023 - between EN 301 489-17 V3.2.4:2020 and EN 301 489-17 V3.2.6:2023
evidence.pageTarget: Test Standard Version Update Without Testing

evidence.claim: The test standard version was updated without testing.
evidence.evidenceText: We hereby update the test standard version without testing.
evidence.pageTarget: Test Standard Version Update Without Testing

evidence.claim: The report applies only to the tested samples and places responsibility for identical production units and modifications on the manufacturer.
evidence.evidenceText: This report apply only to the sample(s) tested. It is the manufacturer’s responsibility to assure the additional production units of this product are manufactured with identical electrical and mechanical components.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is ambiguous: the source mentions Competent Authorities in Europe only in responsibility boilerplate and does not name a specific regulatory authority.
Serial number, variants, and remarks are recorded as N/A in the source.
